message:
test(auth): add edge-case bearer token validation tests

Add three new test cases for bearer auth security:
- Unknown non-health paths require 401 before 404 (auth-first)
- Scheme matching is case-sensitive (lowercase "bearer" must fail)
- Auth check runs before content-type validation (ordering test)

Strengthens security boundary coverage for the bearer token
validation middleware.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
